text: current workaround: reject the duplicate + add a note pointing to the canonical ticket. The full feature (duplicate-of relation, mutual cross-links, one-canonical-per-cloud invariant) is well-specified in the body and adds real navigability. Worth doing after simpler features land.
Part of the relation cluster with T-40 and T-62 — see T-40 note. Should share a common relation model rather than being added as separate ad-hoc fields.
Rejected: use note+close convention instead. No schema change needed.
